notes: 'verify_fail:<substring>' — fails at Verifier.verifyModule; substring in HumanRenderer output
NO 'lower_fail' category: under OQ-11.3=(a), all undeclared identifiers are caught
at verify time by Elaboration or StatementVerifier. No undeclared-identifier program
reaches IrLowering in §4.1 state. Cast-target validation (the P10 lower_fail source)
OQ-11.6=strict: undeclared LOCAL function calls + undeclared for-loop collections
are rejected by StatementVerifier (not just StatementVerifier.verifyVarAssignment
and verifyIncrement). See §6 OQ-11.6 ACCEPTED decision.
IMPORTANT for full fixture generation: do NOT include programs with undeclared
identifiers ONLY in expression context (e.g., 'int x = undeclared') as 'lower_fail'.

positive_entries.name: pos-01-declared-assignment
positive_entries.rationale: Stub: declared assignment — basic positive control. Declared int var assigned; verifier emits no UnknownIdentifier.

negative_entries.name: neg-01-assignment-lhs-undeclared
negative_entries.rationale: Stub: assignment to undeclared LHS — basic negative control. StatementVerifier.verifyVarAssignment emits UnknownIdentifier(ASSIGNMENT_LHS). Message: 'Cannot assign to undeclared identifier'. Closes OQ-3=C for the assignment-LHS case.
